zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Plunkett於1370年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯拉斯莫時，他的父親Sir Richard Plunket31歲，母親Margaret Plunkett31歲。他於1403年與Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯拉雷根享年75歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯登桑尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher Plunkett于1370年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯拉斯莫时，他的父亲Sir Richard Plunket31岁，母亲Margaret Plunkett31岁。他于1403年与Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯拉雷根享年75岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯登桑尼。

nameMeanings.name: Plunkett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a metathesized form of Plouquenet in Ille-et-Villaine, Brittany, so named from Breton plou ‘parish’ (from Latin plebs ‘people’) + Guenec, the personal name (a diminutive of guen ‘white’) of a somewhat obscure saint. As an Irish name, it has been Gaelicized as Pluincéid.

variants.name: Plunket
meanings: English (northern) and Irish: variant of   Plunkett  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Plunkett was born in 1370, in Rathmore, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir Richard Plunket, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Plunkett, was 31. He married Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen in 1403, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1445, in Rathregan, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Dunsany, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Plunkett est né en 1370, à Rathmore, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Richard Plunket, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Plunkett, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen en 1403, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1445, à Rathregan, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Dunsany, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher Plunkett 1370 in Rathmore, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Plunket 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Plunkett 31. Er hat 1403 in Irland Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1445 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Rathregan, County Meath, Irland und wurde in Dunsany, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Plunkett è nato il nel 1370 nel Rathmore, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Richard Plunket, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Plunkett, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen nel 1403, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1445, nel Rathregan, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunsany, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Plunkettが1370年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスラスモーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Plunketは31歳，母Margaret Plunkettは31歳であった。1403年にアイルランドでJoan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスラスレガンで75歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアスダンサニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Plunkett(이)가 1370년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 래스모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Plunket(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Plunkett(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1403년 아일랜드에서 Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 래스레건에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 던산이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Plunkett nasceu em 1370, em Rathmore, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Richard Plunket, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Plunkett, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen em 1403, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1445, em Rathregan, County Meath, Irlanda, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunsany, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Plunkett родился в 1370 г. в местности ратмор, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Plunket было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Plunkett, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen в 1403 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1445 г. в местности ратреган, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности дунсани, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Christopher Plunkett nació en 1370, en Rathmore, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Richard Plunket, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Plunkett, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen en 1403, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1445, en Rathregan, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Dunsany, County Meath, Irlanda.
